signals.headline: Powell Confirms He Will Remain Fed Chair Until Successor Confirmed Amid Ongoing Investigation and Nomination Delays** |
signals.raw:
Powell Confirms He Will Remain Fed Chair Until Successor Confirmed Amid Ongoing Investigation and Nomination Delays** | **YES** | **HIGH** confidence[1][2][3][4]

Jerome Powell stated he will serve as **Fed Chair pro tem** if his successor—reportedly Kevin Warsh—is not confirmed by his term's end on May 15, per federal law and precedent[1][2][3]. He also affirmed no intention to leave the Fed Boar

signals.raw:
Bitcoin's 7-Year 'Uptober' Streak Ends with 3.6% Drop in October 2025** | YES | HIGH confidence[1]

This breaking confirmation—Bitcoin closed October 2025 down 3.35-3.69% at around $109,560, trading now near $110,076—marks the first red October since 2018, driven by $19B liquidations, Trump's China tariffs, and Fed rate hesitation[1]. signals.headline: This Sunday night game featured the 19-year-old rookie No
signals.raw: This Sunday night game featured the 19-year-old rookie No. 1 pick Flagg delivering 45 points, 9 assists, and 8 rebounds—his second straight 40+ point game, first for a rookie since Allen Iverson in 1996-97—while LeBron James had 30 points and 15 assists for the playoff-bound Lakers, now missing Luka Doncic and Austin Reaves for the regular season's remainder.[1]
